import Fixture from '../fixture';

const Fixtures : Fixture[] = [
    {
        id: 1,
        date: "9th September",
        result: "L",
        location: "H",     
        opposition: "Stony Stratford",
        npScore: 0,
        oppScore: 3,
        fixture: "League",
        pts: 0
    },
    {
        id: 2,
        date: "16th September",
        result: "D",
        location: "A",  
        opposition: "Mortonville Juniors",        
        npScore: 3,
        oppScore: 3,
        fixture: "League",
        pts: 1
    },
    {
        id: 3,
        date: "23rd September",
        result: "W",
        location: "H",         
        opposition: "MK Wanderers",
        npScore: 4,
        oppScore: 1,
        fixture: "League",
        pts: 3
    },
    {
        id: 4,
        date: "30th September",
        result: "W",
        location: "H", 
        opposition: "Turvey",        
        oppScore: 1,
        npScore: 3,
        fixture: "League",
        pts: 3
    },
    {
        id: 5,
        date: "7th October",
        result: "L",
        homeTeam: "EB Lions",
        awayTeam: "Panthers",
        homeScore: 8,
        awayScore: 5,
        fixture: "League",
        pts: 0
    },
    {
        id: 6,
        date: "14th October",
        result: "L",
        homeTeam: "Panthers",
        awayTeam: "Tigers",
        homeScore: 5,
        awayScore: 6,
        fixture: "League",
        pts: 0
    },
    {
        id: 7,
        date: "4th November",
        result: "W",
        homeTeam: "Soutcott",
        awayTeam: "Panthers",
        homeScore: 2,
        awayScore: 3,
        fixture: "League",
        pts: 3
    },
    {
        id: 8,
        date: "11th November",
        result: "W",
        homeTeam: "Panthers",
        awayTeam: "Mursley",
        homeScore: 7,
        awayScore: 4,
        fixture: "League",
        pts: 3
    },    
];

export default Fixtures;
